testcase.name: test09

Erro ao limpar o terminal: Security manager blocks ("java.io.FilePermission" "<<ALL FILES>>" "execute") java.lang.Thread.getStackTrace(Thread.java:1564) org.evosuite.runtime.sandbox.MSecurityManager.checkPermission(MSecurityManager.java:434) java.lang.SecurityManager.checkExec(SecurityManager.java:799) java.lang.ProcessBuilder.start(ProcessBuilder.java:1018) org.View.Menu.cleanTerminal(Menu.java:113) org.View.Menu.<init>(Menu.java:29) org.View.ProfileMenu.<init>(ProfileMenu.java:16) org.View.ProfileMenu_ESTest$10.run(ProfileMenu_ESTest.java:268) java.util.concurrent.Executors$RunnableAdapter.call(Executors.java:511) java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:266) java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1149) java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:624) java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:750)
Por favor, insira apenas NГєmeros.
